snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents New Punjabi Song of 2021 Raule By Jassa Dhillon Ft.Gurlez Akhtar.

Title: Raule
Singer: Jassa Dhillon ft. Gurlez Akhtar
Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: B Sanj
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Gagan Shahi

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

Hello Darling Teri Mili Se Supari, Sochya Pehla He Bata Dyun Tanne
Re Goli Maru Ya Re Gaddi Tale Dedu, Ya Re Sidha Zehar Hi Pila Du Tanne

Re Kaise Marna Teri Choice Marunga Re Bina Noise,
Manne Kalakara Ka Bhi Baajan Diya Saaj Na

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sunke Jaiyae Bhag Na

Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..
Dada Ravan… Dada Ravan..

Tere Shehar Mein Jad Raatan Balak Maare Night Out
Chhore Gaam Ke Se Karde Haande Kaand Ladle

Naa Ghar Kya Ne Chirag Pana Koye Na Surag Pana
Faink Denge Nehar, Hath Bandh Ladle

Re Kali Meri Gaddi Aur Gaddi Mein Se Binde 
Aur Bindya Pe Sai Naam Likha Chhitan aale ka

Re Hum Thadde Landlord Pade Koye Na Farak
Bura Haal Tera Monthly Se Vetan Aale Ka

Re Main Baith Jata Je Ghara Main Chhod Deta Keh Ke
Par Ye Jutta Aale Kutte Baba Aale Baaz Na

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raaz Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sunke Jaiye Bhag Na

Ankh Laal Rahve Meri Mere Jeet Ka Suroor
Log Dekh Ke Kave Se Yo To Daaru Pee Rehya Sai

Kayi Puche Haal Chal Deve Peeth Piche Gaal
Nue Loga Ki Re Baal Chhaniwala Jee Raha Se

Mera Koi Na Se Ant Jake Dekh Le Granth
Chhora Dil Ka Se Sant Bas Ache Kaaz Na

Janeman Ishq Ki Umeed Na Kar Humse ,Hum Maut Se Pyar Rakhte Hai..
Tum Radha Ho Phool Rakha Karo Baalon Mein..
Hum Ravan Ke Bhakat Hai, Aankho Mein Angar Rakhte Hai..

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sun Ke Jaiye Bhag Na

Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..

snippet.title: कोण होती पूजा चव्हाण? Who was Pooja Chavan? Maharashtra Minister | Maharashtra News | Sanjay Rathod
snippet.description:
पूजा चव्हाण ही बीड जिल्ह्यातील परळीची रहिवाशी होती. पुजा सामाजिक आणि राजकीय कार्यक्रमात नेहमीच पुढे असायची. काही फोटोंमध्ये ती माजी मंत्री पंकजा मुंडे, खासदार प्रितम मुंडे यांच्यासोबत कार्यक्रमांमध्ये आणि प्रचारातही सोबत दिसत असायची. शिवसेनेचे यवतमाळमधील मंत्री संजय राठोड यांच्यासोबतचे तिचे काही फोटोसुद्धा सोशल मिडीयावर पोस्ट केलेले आहेत. तसेच त्यांच्या समर्थनार्थ तिने काही फेसबुक पोस्टसुद्धा केलेल्या आहेत. पुजा ही बंजारा समाजाची होती आणि ती समाजाच्या कार्यक्रमांमध्ये सहभागी असायची.

#Lokmat #Sanjayrathod #Poojachavan #Pankajamunde #Mahavikasaghadi #Pritammunde 
Subscribe to Our Channel 👉🏻  
https://www.youtube.com/user/LokmatNews?sub_confirmation=1

मित्रांसोबत गप्पा मारताना विश्वसनीय, संशोधनावर आधारीत माहिती सादर करायची असेल तर लोकमतचे चॅनल सबस्क्राईब करा. कारण या चॅनलवर तुम्हाला पाहायला मिळतील अतिशय अभ्यासू, वेगळ्या अँगलच्या बातम्या ! राजकारण, क्राईम, मनोरंजन आणि क्रीडा क्षेत्रातील अनुभवी पत्रकार तुमच्यासाठी आणत आहेत दर्जेदार आणि जाणते करणाऱ्या बातम्या....

localized.title: कोण होती पूजा चव्हाण? Who was Pooja Chavan? Maharashtra Minister | Maharashtra News | Sanjay Rathod
localized.description:
पूजा चव्हाण ही बीड जिल्ह्यातील परळीची रहिवाशी होती. पुजा सामाजिक आणि राजकीय कार्यक्रमात नेहमीच पुढे असायची. काही फोटोंमध्ये ती माजी मंत्री पंकजा मुंडे, खासदार प्रितम मुंडे यांच्यासोबत कार्यक्रमांमध्ये आणि प्रचारातही सोबत दिसत असायची. शिवसेनेचे यवतमाळमधील मंत्री संजय राठोड यांच्यासोबतचे तिचे काही फोटोसुद्धा सोशल मिडीयावर पोस्ट केलेले आहेत. तसेच त्यांच्या समर्थनार्थ तिने काही फेसबुक पोस्टसुद्धा केलेल्या आहेत. पुजा ही बंजारा समाजाची होती आणि ती समाजाच्या कार्यक्रमांमध्ये सहभागी असायची.

#Lokmat #Sanjayrathod #Poojachavan #Pankajamunde #Mahavikasaghadi #Pritammunde 
Subscribe to Our Channel 👉🏻  
https://www.youtube.com/user/LokmatNews?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana | Episode - 1 | Don Pruthvi | Pravallika | Kusuma | Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series. 

Directed by: Saikumar Netha

Cast : Don pruthvi, Pravalika Damerla, Aarif, Prem Ranjith
 
Dop: Seshuraj Daddala, Vamshi Srinivas, Dinesh Parchuri, Kala Pavan

Concept : Madhav

Writer's : Raghuram Bahuthama, Manu Alluri.

Music & mixing : Srujan Shashanka

Violin : Sandiliya Pisapati

Editing : Krishna Karthik Vunnava

Vfx : Pavan Kumar Konte

Title design: Nikhil Concepts

Poster design : Design Manchu

Sound Engineer : Vamsi Vinod Nalli.

Co- Director : Malli Karjun Reddy
Assistant directors : Tony Manoj, Jayanth...

Executive producer: Srividya P

Line producer : Sai Harish

Produced by :  Infinitum Media

#TPSV #Infinitummedia #donpruthvi

snippet.title: Consumer Awareness | Part - 1 | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Consumer Protection Act, 2019 is a law to protect the interests of the consumers. This act was inevitable to resolve a large number of pending consumer complaints in consumer courts across the country. It has ways and means to solve the consumer grievances speedily.
The basic aim of the Consumer Protection Act, 2019 to save the rights of the consumers by establishing authorities for timely and effective administration and settlement of consumers’ disputes.
Some Rights of Consumers are;
i. To have information about the quantity, quality, purity, potency, price, and standard of goods or services.

ii. To be protected from hazardous goods and services.

iii. To be protected from unfair or restrictive trade practices.

snippet.title: औक़ात बनाने से बनती है 🔥 | @A2 Motivation {Arvind Arora}  | Arvind Arora | Josh Talks Hindi
snippet.description:
आइये देते है अपने सपनों को नई उम्मीद सिर्फ एक Test के साथ. 
Register करें Josh Recruitment Test 2021 के लिए और बनायें Sales में अपना career. 
Job Location: Delhi NCR/Bangalore. 
ज़्यादा जानकारी के लिए यहाँ जायें: https://bit.ly/3a2msny 

जिंदगी में Success बिना Hard Work के नहीं मिलती ये बात तो हम सब जानते है लेकिन success पाने के लिए और क्या करना पड़ता है ?आज Josh talks पर एक ऐसी ही कहाँनी हम सबके सामने है . @A2 Motivation {Arvind Arora}  की कहाँनी भी बार बार गिर कर उठने की है कैसे एक small village में रहने वाले अरविन्द के Dreams भी छोटे छोटे थे उनकी कहाँनी हमे सिखाएगी की How to dream big. लेकिन छोटे सपने देखने वाला छोटे गाँव में रहने वाला लड़का जब समाज के उन लोगों को गलत साबित करने बाहर निकला जिनका मानना है की big dreams , small village के लड़को के बस की बात नहीं है तब Arvind को बहुत struggles का सामना करना पड़ा उन्होंने failures देखे , business partners ने धोखा भी दिया और भी Struggle अरविन्द ने झेले लेकिन आज Arvind एक famous youtuber है , teacher aur एक motivational speaker भी है। arvind ने महज 4 months में 4 million youtube subscriber हासिल किये 

चलिए आज arvind से सीखते है 


What are the secrets to success? Well, successful people work hard. But you work hard too, right?
And if you keep working harder and harder you’re just going to be miserable. So what’s the answer?
Successful people don’t just work hard, they also work differently.
So let’s see what we can learn from extremely successful people who achieve big things. Today let’s hear the success story of A2 Motivation AKA Arvind Arora. 
Arvind arora was always an average kid. He never had big dreams. But one incident changed his life and he decided that we will become super successful one day. Arvind started working hard. After completing his engineering degree he started working as an educator. He even started his own coaching business but failed eventually. He didn’t gave up and kept on working hard. 
Then he started creating online content. He initially started on tik tok then he became a youtube creator and within 4 months he was able to gain 4 million subscribers. 
Today he is successful and popularly known as A2 Motivation. 

#JoshTalksHindi #ArvindArora #A2Motivation


Watch his latest video here - 

अब Mobile चार्ज होगा हवा से 😲 new technology 🔥 #shorts​ by arvind arora - https://youtu.be/4K7SKAbxpms

Learnings from Arvind’s Josh Talk - 
How to gain subscribers in youtube? (Youtube mein subscriber kaise badhayein)
How to dream big? (bade sapne kaise dekhe)
How to be successful in life? (zindagi me safal kaise bane)

Watch some of his popular videos - 
खाने का खाना बनाने का है शौक पर नहीं है पेट | #ARVINDARORA​ #ShortVideo - https://youtu.be/L4MNj9LQx9w 


रतन टाटा जी ने कैसे लिया अपमान का बदला 🔥 #shorts - https://youtu.be/pZVQlP0lm80 
बेचने की कला 🔥 इस Example से सीखो 🔥 #shorts - https://youtu.be/xgkvw9oQaBE 
Follow arvind arora or social media platforms - 

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/arvind.aroraj/​ 
Twitter :- https://twitter.com/ArorajArvind?s=09​ 
FACEBOOK PAGE :-https://www.facebook.com/arvind.aroraj/​ 



Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life. 

जोश Talks मे हम देशभर से प्रेरणादायक कहानियां इकट्टठा करते हैं और आप तक पंहुचाते हैं. ये कहानियां उन लोगों की होती हैं जिन्होनें मुश्किल परिस्थितियों के आगे भी हिम्मत नहीं हारी और अपने जुनून से सफलता की नई मिसाल कायम की. इन कहानियों को सांझा करने का उद्देश्य है कि हम युवा पीढ़ी में जोश और उत्साह भर सकें. जोश Talks हर उस व्यक्ति के लिए हैं जो जीवन में नई दिशा ढूंढ रहें और कुछ अलग करके दिखाना चाहते हैं. तो जुड़िये जोश Talks से और जानिये आपके ही आस-पास जन्मी मोटीवेशनल कहानियां. 

► जोश Talks Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoshTalksHindi 
► जोश Talks Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/JoshTalksHindi 
► जोश Talks Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/JoshTalksHindi 

-----**DISCLAIMER**----- All of the views and work outside the pretext of the video of the speaker, are his/ her own and Josh Talks, by any means, does not support them directly or indirectly and neither is it liable for it. Viewers are requested to use their own discretion while viewing the content and focus on the entirety of the story rather than finding inferences in its parts. Josh Talks by any means, does not further or amplify any specific ideology or propaganda.

snippet.title: Sona Lagda (Official Video) Sukriti, Prakriti, Sukhe | Bharatt-Saurabh | Satti Dhillon | New Song
snippet.description:
To celebrate the season of love VYRL Originals brings to you a Valentines special - Sona Lagda sung by the multi-talented twin sisters Sukriti - Prakriti collaborating for the very first time with the hitmaker Sukh-E Muzical Doctorz. This peppy dance song has been co-composed and written by Bharatt-Saurabh and Sukh-E and the music video has been directed by the popular Satti Dhillon. The melodic drop and vibrant music video is sure to get your foot tapping. Are you ready for this banger?

#SukritiPrakriti #SukhE #SonaLagda

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ15fDfJ/

♫ Wynk Music - https://wynk.in/u/V3Rb56bXw

♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/album/sona-lagda

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/p/album/hindi/sona-lagda-2021/MVBj5k9MBCM_

♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/7pef1s876Fl3KO2LH1eSFx?si=_BCadcjtRsynIPQsi8rRow

♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sona-lagda/1551963715?i=1551963717

♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08VWPY8R3?do=play&trackAsin=B08VW8M79N&ref=dm_sh_yjahxy9lbxow6IGh744DFw4fp

♫ YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=8uIgCCHnbBQ&feature=share
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧  Audio Credits

🎤 Singer - Sukriti Prakriti & Sukh E
🎶  Composer - Bharatt – Saurabh & Sukh E
➟ Lyrics - Bharatt – Saurabh & Sukh E
➟ Music Producer - Bharatt-Saurabh
➟ Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay.

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Director Satti Dhillon
➟ Creative Director Pooja Gujral
➟ Dop Shinda singh
➟ Editor Oswin
➟ Choreographer Sahaj singh & Shreoshi
➟ Art director Mr. blacc
➟ Assistant director Sumit kumar & Prince mundi
➟ Assistant choreographer Pranjal Dutta & Priyanka Mitra
➟ Colorist Ercan kucuk (The Post brothers)
➟ Hairstylist (sukhe) Jeevan
➟ Makeup Rajan passi
➟ Still Photography Shivam
➟ Line producer Kuldeep production

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📝 Lyrics

Jab se mili hai teri meri ye nazar
Rab di sau kuch hua hai asar

Lakh lakh munde rakhen meri ni khabar
Ek mainu bas teri hi fikar
Kahin vi tu mainu le ja soneya
Sang raj ke chalan main ambaraan
Tenu takdi phiran din raat ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Mainu apna banale tu yaar ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Light weight jhanjharan juti sadkan nu chumdi phire
Gold chains laake mascara dolled up hoke ghumdi phire
You hotter than the lava baby girl
Lit tera mascara baby girl
Ni rang tera strawberry varga
Ni dil kare khaajaan baby girl

Fashion nova de jean kude
Lakk tera heavy body lean kude
Apple bottoms so fired up
Dil chore kare badi ni tu mean kude
Dil chori kare badi ni tu mean kude

Tenu takdi phiran din raat ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Mainu apna banale tu yaar ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Kudi soni tu meriyan baharan ve
One in million lagdi tu yaara ve
Lagdi tu soni lagdi
Mere kaul tu aake baija ve
Mitthiyan gallan karja
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Soni lagdi tu soni lagdi
Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Soni lagdi tu soni lagdi

Sona lagda

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: R NAIT : U Turn (Official Video) | Ft. Shipra Goyal | Jeona & Jogi | New Punjabi Song 2020/2021

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3031 - Full Episode - 6th November 2020
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch full episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 3031: Jetha Must Wake Up Early
------------------------------------------------------------------
Jetha is passing time over WhatsApp and reading jokes when Bapuji and Tapu enter the room. Bapuji asks Jetha if he has decided to wake up late on the very first day. When Jetha tells him that he isn't sleepy yet, Bappuji tells him that no one will wake Jetha up the next morning. He must do it on his own.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Hog Mountain Challenge Is On! (Clash Of Clans Lunar New Year Special)
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to conquer the mighty Golden Dragon and beat the Hog Mountain challenge? Earn 2 Builder Potions, Gems and Resources by scoring 3 stars in one attack during this Lunar New Year special event! 

Featuring: the Warrior King skin, the brand new Hog Mountain scenery, the Wall Breaker decoration, and the Lucky Shrub seasonal obstacle. Also a blast from the past: the Warrior Queen skin! 



Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #lunarnewyear #hogmountain #warriorking

snippet.title: King - Picasso | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅♥️Follow🤴🏽On Instagram♥️✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking

LYRICS:

Hook

Tujhe sochne ki chhod,
Bina dekhe tasveer bana dun main,
Nigaahon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Tujhe dhoondhne ki chhod,
Jab chaahun tujhe chhoo ke bataadun main,
Fizaaon mein meri...
 Ho! - 2.T

Verse 1

Ajkal raja sambhle na tere sheher walon se,
Ajkal saare todh rakhe daant zeher walon ke,
Mujhe nasha nai pasand par sajde mehkhaano ke,
Maanu tumhe hi nasha ye tum batao kaise maanoge?

Khair!!

Ankhon mein tere surma hai jawaan,
It makes me hypnotise teri bahan ch main rawaan,
Pata nahi tu kaise ise legi but baby if you ready then just be my baby mama?!

Kudi kari jaan lina meri flex,
Munde kari jaan sign mera throw,
Mere beriyaan nu pata kal bright,
Tayiyon Raja inna kardeyaan glow.

Kehndi baby mennu pata hega,
Sara din gang gang mere aagge so sweet!
Duje phone wich Shooteraan de number saare scar face mennu laggan so freak.

Main ta bas teri khair mangdiyaan,
Tera naa leke taane kase sangdiyaan.

Rap

Jaana bachho mein tu rehna ab chhod de,
Ye saale darr jaate chhote chhote mod pe,
Maine aate hi le mahaaul banaya,
Jab maare kehke bande aur hit dono road pe.

Mera lifestyle thoda different
Karam peeche saare kaand hain front
Ek banda tode kitto ke ghamad
Baby if it's no risk maybe it's no fun.

Bas meri jaan tu hi jaan pe bani,
Mai jaha se bhi shuru kar lun khatam vahi,
Jaha pe teri yaadein aayi mere ghar na ho
Zehen mein meri par saari rahein..

Hook

Tujhe sochne ki chhod,
Bina dekhe tasveer bana dun main,
Nigaahon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Tujhe dhoondhne ki chhod,
Jab chaahun tujhe chhoo ke bataadun main,
Fizaaon mein meri...Tum Ho!

CREDITS:

Artist - King
Lyrics By King
Composed By King
Female Lead - Drutika Singh
Music Produced By Section 8
Previous Mix By Hrithik / Lax
Final Mix & Master By Rahul Sathu

This album is in association with KingsclanMGMT.
Digitally marketed By
Kingsclan Marketing.
Produced By King
Co-Produced By KingsClanMgmt
Directed&Edited By Miikey
Cinematography By Yash Chhabra

VFX By Shivam Solanki @supar_human
Digitally Handled By Shahu Shinde

📮kingsclanmgmt@gmail.com

snippet.title: Jetha की Corona वाली धमकी-Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah -तारक मेहता -Ep 3100 - 11th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-sahab-plan-for-vasooli-1000107721?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3100: Bagha Gives Jethalal An Idea
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Taarak has come to Jethalal's warehouse to help Jethalal but before giving any idea Taarak wants to eat something. Bagha beings bhajiya for Taarak. Taarak eats the bhajiya while Bagha gives an idea to get money back from Bhogilal. Bagha comes up with the idea of getting Corona. Will Corona help Jethalal to get his money back? Watch the full episode to find out.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te

Mere geet utte ne sharabi nachde
Khadki jande ne ni glass kach de
Khadke de vicho mennu saaj sunn de
Saaja' vicho' kann teri vaaj sunn de
Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1172 &1173 | Recap
snippet.description:
Parmeet sees Preeto getting on her knees with beseeching eyes to know Heer's whereabouts. To this, Parmeet agrees to tell her about Heer, but on one condition, which Preeto agrees to in an instant! What is the condition that Parmeet has for Preeto?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Valentines Day Special Recipe | Fortune Cookies Recipe in Tamil
snippet.description:
In this video we will see how to make fortune cookies recipe in tamil. These fortune cookies can be used to give messages in a small piece of paper which is placed inside these crunchy cookies. I always loved reading the messages inside these cookies. Since Valentine's day is right around the corner, I have decorated these fortune cookies with heart shaped decorations.

#FortuneCookies #ValentinesRecipe

Friends, please do try this fortune cookies at home and share messages with your loved ones. Also please do share your feedback about the recipe in the comments below. All the best and happy cooking!

Makes 12 Cookies
Ingredients:
1 large Egg White
3 tbsp Sugar
2 tbsp butter
pinch of Salt
1/4 cup Maida
Yellow and Red food color

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की  | Episode 63 & 64 | Recap
snippet.description:
Purvi feels embarrassed when all the students begin talking about her dressing sense and lavishness. She tells Virendra about her solution of going to college like a normal person. How will Virendra react to Purvi's wish of going to college without the status of the village chief's wife?

#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KugwSJL_LP3-WDgtLMI4Z13

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 197 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Anirudh finds the snippets of Bondita's writing in which she talks about the problem she believes to be a curse. Will he be able to convince Bondita about the natural reality of her problem? Tune in to this sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: Watch Ramdas Athawale’s poetic farewell to Ghulam Nabi Azad in Rajya Sabha
snippet.description:
Rajya Sabha MP Ramdas Athawale gave a poetic farewell to Congress leader Ghulam Nabi Azad who retires from the upper house on 15th February 2021. Delivering a speech in his inimitable style, Athawale lauded Azad’s services and also made an offer to the senior Congress leader. Athawale said that if the Congress does not give Azad a Rajya Sabha ticket, the RPI would gladly do so. Watch this full video for all the details.

snippet.title: VK Sasikala pays tribute to late Tamil Nadu CM Jayalalithaa, returns to Chennai after 4 years
snippet.description:
#VKSasikala #TamilNadu
Expelled AIADMK leader V.K. Sasikala returned to poll-bound Tamil Nadu after 4 years Monday. Ahead of the journey to Chennai from Bengaluru, Sasikala and T.T.V. Dhinakaran offered floral tribute to late Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. Sasikala will meet her sister-in-law on 8 February in Chennai.

snippet.title: Chhor Denge: Parampara Tandon | Sachet-Parampara | Nora Fatehi, Ehan Bhat | Arvindr K, Bhushan Kumar
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Chhor Denge", a brand new song in the voice of “Parampara Tandon" featuring Nora Fatehi & Ehan Bhat. The lyrics of new song are penned by Yogesh Dubey &  music composed by Sachet-Parampara. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Kundali Bhagya: Trouble in Kritika & Akshay's wedding
snippet.description:
Watch the report of Saas Bahu Aur Saazish to know the latest updates from the sets of the serial Kundali Bhagya. Have a look at how choas erupted in Kritika & Akshay's wedding. Stay connected for regular updates on top entertainment stories. 

Watch Saas Bahu aur Saazish (SBS) on ABP News daily at 2:30 PM to know what's happening in Indian television and bollywood industry with Aditi Arora Sawant. Presenting you the latest updates and daily dose of entertainment in the form of star cast interviews, gossips, updates of reality shows, behind the scenes, twist in serials. Join the non stop entertainment with Saas Bahu aur Saazish for all the juicy news.

टेलीविजन और बॉलीवुड इंडस्ट्री के बारे में जानने के लिए एबीपी न्यूज़ पर देखिये सास बहु और साज़िश (एसबीएस) अदिति रॉव सावंत के साथ  रोज़ाना 2:30 बजे। एसबीएस पेश करता है स्टार कास्ट के इंटरव्यू, रियलिटी शो के अपडेट, सीरियल्स के नए मोड़, परदे के पीछे की कुछ गपशप और भी बहुत कुछ। नॉन स्टॉप मनोरंजन के लिए शामिल हों सास बहू और साज़िश के साथ। 

For your daily dose of Entertainment, you can subscribe to our channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/sbsabpnews

ABP Hindi: http://abpnews.abplive.in/
ABP English: http://www.abplive.in/

snippet.title: That Irritating Uncle | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Whatever gender you are, after reaching certain age, wherever we go we are bombarded with the same question, When are you getting married? When is your turn? etc.
After certain point of time it really gets on our nerve but we cannot express our anger or irritation towards them. So this video expresses those feelings for you all who are in that space. Enjoy.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unimited Team
